Home About Me Projects

Hey there! I am a Developer and Digital Consultant from the United States doing freelance work and currently residing in Berlin, Germany.

I am a creator and a maker. I love taking ideas and making them a reality. From helping an organization run smoother to building great products, digging in and make things happen is what drives me.


Currently, I'm actively working with these technologies:

Meteor React MongoDB Javscript HTML5

When I'm not building something great, I'm probably on the lookout for great books, better adventures, and the best eats.

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions and/or comments you have. Thanks for visiting!
